Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Aug-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, A. Morgan Jones of A. Morgan Jones Law Offices (415-421-5200) appears as counsel for defendants/moving parties, John Miller, Esq. and Miller Law Inc.

No other appearance is made in this matter.

DEFENDANTS JOHN MILLER, ESQ. AND MILLER LAW INC.'S Motion For Change Of Venue is DENIED. Plaintiff was offered a court-reporting job via telephone, which it accepted in its San Francisco office; plaintiff's choice of San Francisco venue is thus proper. (See CCP 395; Wilson v. Scannaviono (1958) 159 Cal.App.2d 369.) Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, bus. tel: (530) 339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)
